meta.eps_matched_doc: native eps: 0.09 vs 0.023; cross-system control, same BC class

PCI.note: Real overlap PCI from annotated_results; independent of regime count.

TBS.note: TBS_norm is sweep-window dependent; window_band shows its range under +/-10-20% window cropping. tbs_observable_intrinsic is the window-robust companion (0.5-span crossing position).

topology.note: Regime-count + adjacency agreement, counted once (replaces collinear RCD+SDI of v1).

flags: TBS_WINDOW_FRAGILE: TBS_norm moves >0.1 under window cropping — boundary-shift verdict is sweep-window dependent.
